name: Apple-Spice Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and peel the apples.
2. Chop them as fine as possible.
3. Cream shortening and sugar until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir together flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, nutmeg, and ginger; blend into the creamed mixture.
6. Mix in chopped apples.
7. Spread evenly in a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
8. In a small bowl, mix sugar and cinnamon until combined.
9. Sprinkle the mixture over the dough.
10. Bake at 350 degrees F for 25 to 30 minutes.
11. Allow to cool before cutting into bars.
Makes 36 bars.
